cases.baseline_next_action: Contact startup to discuss Triton adoption.
cases.description: Generic latency recommendation should become a measurable Triton experiment.

enriched_next_action.evidence_requirement: baseline p50/p95 latency, model artifact, and traffic shape
enriched_next_action.metric: p95 latency and throughput under representative load
enriched_next_action.next_step: NVIDIA technical solution architect to run Triton Inference Server validation: measure p95 latency and throughput under representative load against threshold >=20% p95 latency reduction or >=15% throughput gain within 10 business days.
enriched_next_action.success_decision: run a Triton deployment plan with startup engineering
enriched_next_action.threshold: >=20% p95 latency reduction or >=15% throughput gain

cases.baseline_next_action: Schedule technical discussion about NVIDIA NIM.
cases.description: External API dependency recommendation should define NIM validation metrics.

enriched_next_action.evidence_requirement: external API usage, privacy constraints, and model compatibility
enriched_next_action.metric: self-hosted inference cost, data-control fit, and p95 latency
enriched_next_action.next_step: NVIDIA technical solution architect to run NVIDIA NIM validation: measure self-hosted inference cost, data-control fit, and p95 latency against threshold validated data-control path and >=20% cost or latency improvement within 10 business days.
enriched_next_action.success_decision: scope NVIDIA NIM proof of value
enriched_next_action.threshold: validated data-control path and >=20% cost or latency improvement

cases.description: Agent governance recommendation should include violation-rate measurement.

enriched_next_action.evidence_requirement: agent workflows, tool policies, and failure examples
enriched_next_action.metric: policy violation catch rate and false-positive rate
enriched_next_action.next_step: NVIDIA technical solution architect to run NeMo Guardrails validation: measure policy violation catch rate and false-positive rate against threshold >=90% critical violation catch rate with acceptable false positives within 10 business days.
enriched_next_action.threshold: >=90% critical violation catch rate with acceptable false positives

methodology: Compares generic recommendation next actions against deterministic enriched next actions. This justifies product spike work, not default runtime adoption.
